arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham will need to overcome AZ Alkmaar over two legs to progress into the last eight of the Europa League. Ange Postecoglou’s side finished in fourth place in the league phase with only one loss to their name. In those eight games, Spurs actually faced AZ Alkmaar and won 1-0 at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. arts.ttl: How Tottenham misfit Troy Parrott turned into a goal machine and is plotting their Europa League downfall with AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Few noticed when AZ Alkmaar paid £7million for Parrott last summer. But he has thrived in the Netherlands, first on loan at Excelsior last season and now in a young AZ outfit.
